---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to see added or improved.

## Use Case

Describe the scenario where this would be useful. Who benefits and how?

> Example: "When using LLMask as a proxy for code assistants, internal project names and file paths also need to be masked, but the current regex patterns don't cover them."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work. Be as specific or as high-level as you prefer — even a rough idea helps.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer your proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Links, prior art, related issues, or anything else that might help.
